% Muñoz-Tamayo 2026
% program with the ODE of the sensitivities 

function [Fv] = OED_ATse(t,X)

global tDMI yDMI wBrOptim


tm = mod(t,24);
DMI = interp1(tDMI,yDMI,tm);

k_Ibr = 5.0766e-05; 
p1    = 0.3655;
p2    = 0.6371;
p3    = 0.3787;
p4    = 0.1160;

x_br_AT  = 6.84/1000;  %Content of bromoform in Asparagopsis taxiformis, g/gDM

wBr = wBrOptim; 

Np= 5;  
Nx= 19; 

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
% State Variables
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

Z_ndf = X(1);
Z_nsc = X(2);
Z_pro = X(3);
S_su = X(4);
S_aa = X(5);
S_ac = X(6);
S_bu = X(7);
S_pr = X(8);
S_IN = X(9);
S_IC = X(10);
S_h2 = X(11);
S_ch4 = X(12);
X_su = X(13);
X_aa = X(14);
X_h2 = X(15);
Sg_co2 = X(16);
Sg_h2 = X(17);
Sg_ch4 = X(18);
S_br = X(19);

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
% State equations
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

	 Fv(1,:)=(387*DMI)/1000 - (59*Z_ndf)/1000;
	 Fv(2,:)=(397*DMI)/1000 + (86853072600035747*X_aa)/4611686018427387904 + (86853072600035747*X_h2)/4611686018427387904 + (86853072600035747*X_su)/4611686018427387904 - (19*Z_nsc)/200;
	 Fv(3,:)=(4*DMI)/25 + (955383798600393217*X_aa)/18446744073709551616 + (955383798600393217*X_h2)/18446744073709551616 + (955383798600393217*X_su)/18446744073709551616 - Z_pro/8;
	 Fv(4,:)=(3*Z_ndf)/22520 - (7*S_su)/200 + (3*Z_nsc)/9008 - (50*S_su*X_su)/(37*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1));
	 Fv(5,:)=(9*Z_pro)/13400 - (7*S_aa)/200 - (100*S_aa*X_aa)/(37*((50*S_aa)/37 + 4/625));
	 Fv(6,:)=(4623*S_aa*X_aa)/(3700*((50*S_aa)/37 + 4/625)) - (7*S_ac)/200 + (50*S_su*X_su*((26*p1)/15 + (26*p3)/45 - (13189368649737995*Sg_h2*p2)/17592186044416 + (13189368649737995*Sg_h2*p4)/52776558133248))/(37*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1));
	 Fv(7,:)=(414*S_aa*X_aa)/(925*((50*S_aa)/37 + 4/625)) - (7*S_bu)/200 - (50*S_su*X_su*((13*p1)/15 + (13*p3)/15 - (13189368649737995*Sg_h2*p2)/35184372088832 + (13189368649737995*Sg_h2*p4)/35184372088832 - 13/15))/(37*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1));
	 Fv(8,:)=(2139*S_aa*X_aa)/(18500*((50*S_aa)/37 + 4/625)) - (7*S_pr)/200 + (50*S_su*X_su*((52*p3)/45 + (13189368649737995*Sg_h2*p4)/26388279066624))/(37*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1));
	 Fv(9,:)=(169*S_aa*X_aa)/(37*((50*S_aa)/37 + 4/625)) - (7*S_IN)/200 - (8*S_su*X_su)/(37*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1)) - (24*S_h2*X_h2*k_Ibr)/(185*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1)*((50*S_br)/37 + k_Ibr)*((50*S_h2)/37 + 3447327532494841/590295810358705651712));
	 Fv(10,:)=(1518*S_aa*X_aa)/(925*((50*S_aa)/37 + 4/625)) - (37437188840175222476449963193855692274605509237107*S_IC)/36595318470693408992266985403479461998064828416000 - (50*S_su*X_su*((52*p3)/45 + (13189368649737995*Sg_h2*p4)/26388279066624 - 26/15))/(37*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1)) - (212*S_h2*X_h2*k_Ibr)/(37*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1)*((50*S_br)/37 + k_Ibr)*((50*S_h2)/37 + 3447327532494841/590295810358705651712));
	 Fv(11,:)=(12519561830815797264948694764841715121*Sg_h2)/6490371073168534535663120411525120000 - (83683*S_h2)/10000 + (2829*S_aa*X_aa)/(1850*((50*S_aa)/37 + 4/625)) - (50*S_su*X_su*((26*p3)/15 - (26*p1)/15 + (13189368649737995*Sg_h2*p2)/17592186044416 + (13189368649737995*Sg_h2*p4)/17592186044416 - 26/15))/(37*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1)) - (800*S_h2*X_h2*k_Ibr)/(37*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1)*((50*S_br)/37 + k_Ibr)*((50*S_h2)/37 + 3447327532494841/590295810358705651712));
	 Fv(12,:)=(585359313937024249987441252737109779*Sg_ch4)/202824096036516704239472512860160000 - (83683*S_ch4)/10000 + (188*S_h2*X_h2*k_Ibr)/(37*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1)*((50*S_br)/37 + k_Ibr)*((50*S_h2)/37 + 3447327532494841/590295810358705651712));
	 Fv(13,:)=(8*S_su*X_su)/(37*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1)) - (4131301673867366791*X_su)/115292150460684697600;
	 Fv(14,:)=(31*S_aa*X_aa)/(37*((50*S_aa)/37 + 4/625)) - (4131301673867366791*X_aa)/115292150460684697600;
	 Fv(15,:)=(24*S_h2*X_h2*k_Ibr)/(185*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1)*((50*S_br)/37 + k_Ibr)*((50*S_h2)/37 + 3447327532494841/590295810358705651712)) - (4131301673867366791*X_h2)/115292150460684697600;
	 Fv(16,:)=(36156352693700953161720618704733911104673240242547*S_IC)/36595318470693408992266985403479461998064828416000 - (50*Sg_co2*((195447214458445995625269784791965247771667868987040913516162517879*S_IC)/7622493146550525315498565580505461809357049526195512771912663040 + (450465865858842165281*S_ch4)/2082914827658854400 + (450465865858842165281*S_h2)/2082914827658854400 - (1829078211542602720173134059526805495527793697365081*Sg_h2)/36537540933272572955092120817907075491398313574400 - (85519603762040814091573180601022357631500698583819*Sg_ch4)/1141798154164767904846628775559596109106197299200))/(3*((8650717*Sg_h2)/20000 + (8650717*Sg_ch4)/20000 + (8650717*Sg_co2)/20000));
	 Fv(17,:)=(83333*S_h2)/10000 - (12519561830815797264948694764841715121*Sg_h2)/6490371073168534535663120411525120000 - (50*Sg_h2*((195447214458445995625269784791965247771667868987040913516162517879*S_IC)/7622493146550525315498565580505461809357049526195512771912663040 + (450465865858842165281*S_ch4)/2082914827658854400 + (450465865858842165281*S_h2)/2082914827658854400 - (1829078211542602720173134059526805495527793697365081*Sg_h2)/36537540933272572955092120817907075491398313574400 - (85519603762040814091573180601022357631500698583819*Sg_ch4)/1141798154164767904846628775559596109106197299200))/(3*((8650717*Sg_h2)/20000 + (8650717*Sg_ch4)/20000 + (8650717*Sg_co2)/20000));
	 Fv(18,:)=(83333*S_ch4)/10000 - (585359313937024249987441252737109779*Sg_ch4)/202824096036516704239472512860160000 - (50*Sg_ch4*((195447214458445995625269784791965247771667868987040913516162517879*S_IC)/7622493146550525315498565580505461809357049526195512771912663040 + (450465865858842165281*S_ch4)/2082914827658854400 + (450465865858842165281*S_h2)/2082914827658854400 - (1829078211542602720173134059526805495527793697365081*Sg_h2)/36537540933272572955092120817907075491398313574400 - (85519603762040814091573180601022357631500698583819*Sg_ch4)/1141798154164767904846628775559596109106197299200))/(3*((8650717*Sg_h2)/20000 + (8650717*Sg_ch4)/20000 + (8650717*Sg_co2)/20000));
	 Fv(19,:)=(DMI*wBr)/100 - (13*S_br)/100;

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
% Derivative of F with respect to the parameters 
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

	dFdpv(1,1)=0;
	dFdpv(1,2)=0;
	dFdpv(1,3)=0;
	dFdpv(1,4)=0;
	dFdpv(1,5)=0;
	dFdpv(2,1)=0;
	dFdpv(2,2)=0;
	dFdpv(2,3)=0;
	dFdpv(2,4)=0;
	dFdpv(2,5)=0;
	dFdpv(3,1)=0;
	dFdpv(3,2)=0;
	dFdpv(3,3)=0;
	dFdpv(3,4)=0;
	dFdpv(3,5)=0;
	dFdpv(4,1)=0;
	dFdpv(4,2)=0;
	dFdpv(4,3)=0;
	dFdpv(4,4)=0;
	dFdpv(4,5)=0;
	dFdpv(5,1)=0;
	dFdpv(5,2)=0;
	dFdpv(5,3)=0;
	dFdpv(5,4)=0;
	dFdpv(5,5)=0;
	dFdpv(6,1)=0;
	dFdpv(6,2)=(260*S_su*X_su)/(111*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1));
	dFdpv(6,3)=-(329734216243449875*S_su*Sg_h2*X_su)/(325455441821696*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1));
	dFdpv(6,4)=(260*S_su*X_su)/(333*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1));
	dFdpv(6,5)=(329734216243449875*S_su*Sg_h2*X_su)/(976366325465088*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1));
	dFdpv(7,1)=0;
	dFdpv(7,2)=-(130*S_su*X_su)/(111*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1));
	dFdpv(7,3)=(329734216243449875*S_su*Sg_h2*X_su)/(650910883643392*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1));
	dFdpv(7,4)=-(130*S_su*X_su)/(111*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1));
	dFdpv(7,5)=-(329734216243449875*S_su*Sg_h2*X_su)/(650910883643392*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1));
	dFdpv(8,1)=0;
	dFdpv(8,2)=0;
	dFdpv(8,3)=0;
	dFdpv(8,4)=(520*S_su*X_su)/(333*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1));
	dFdpv(8,5)=(329734216243449875*S_su*Sg_h2*X_su)/(488183162732544*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1));
	dFdpv(9,1)=(24*S_h2*X_h2*k_Ibr)/(185*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1)*((50*S_br)/37 + k_Ibr)^2*((50*S_h2)/37 + 3447327532494841/590295810358705651712)) - (24*S_h2*X_h2)/(185*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1)*((50*S_br)/37 + k_Ibr)*((50*S_h2)/37 + 3447327532494841/590295810358705651712));
	dFdpv(9,2)=0;
	dFdpv(9,3)=0;
	dFdpv(9,4)=0;
	dFdpv(9,5)=0;
	dFdpv(10,1)=(212*S_h2*X_h2*k_Ibr)/(37*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1)*((50*S_br)/37 + k_Ibr)^2*((50*S_h2)/37 + 3447327532494841/590295810358705651712)) - (212*S_h2*X_h2)/(37*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1)*((50*S_br)/37 + k_Ibr)*((50*S_h2)/37 + 3447327532494841/590295810358705651712));
	dFdpv(10,2)=0;
	dFdpv(10,3)=0;
	dFdpv(10,4)=-(520*S_su*X_su)/(333*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1));
	dFdpv(10,5)=-(329734216243449875*S_su*Sg_h2*X_su)/(488183162732544*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1));
	dFdpv(11,1)=(800*S_h2*X_h2*k_Ibr)/(37*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1)*((50*S_br)/37 + k_Ibr)^2*((50*S_h2)/37 + 3447327532494841/590295810358705651712)) - (800*S_h2*X_h2)/(37*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1)*((50*S_br)/37 + k_Ibr)*((50*S_h2)/37 + 3447327532494841/590295810358705651712));
	dFdpv(11,2)=(260*S_su*X_su)/(111*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1));
	dFdpv(11,3)=-(329734216243449875*S_su*Sg_h2*X_su)/(325455441821696*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1));
	dFdpv(11,4)=-(260*S_su*X_su)/(111*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1));
	dFdpv(11,5)=-(329734216243449875*S_su*Sg_h2*X_su)/(325455441821696*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1));
	dFdpv(12,1)=(188*S_h2*X_h2)/(37*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1)*((50*S_br)/37 + k_Ibr)*((50*S_h2)/37 + 3447327532494841/590295810358705651712)) - (188*S_h2*X_h2*k_Ibr)/(37*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1)*((50*S_br)/37 + k_Ibr)^2*((50*S_h2)/37 + 3447327532494841/590295810358705651712));
	dFdpv(12,2)=0;
	dFdpv(12,3)=0;
	dFdpv(12,4)=0;
	dFdpv(12,5)=0;
	dFdpv(13,1)=0;
	dFdpv(13,2)=0;
	dFdpv(13,3)=0;
	dFdpv(13,4)=0;
	dFdpv(13,5)=0;
	dFdpv(14,1)=0;
	dFdpv(14,2)=0;
	dFdpv(14,3)=0;
	dFdpv(14,4)=0;
	dFdpv(14,5)=0;
	dFdpv(15,1)=(24*S_h2*X_h2)/(185*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1)*((50*S_br)/37 + k_Ibr)*((50*S_h2)/37 + 3447327532494841/590295810358705651712)) - (24*S_h2*X_h2*k_Ibr)/(185*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1)*((50*S_br)/37 + k_Ibr)^2*((50*S_h2)/37 + 3447327532494841/590295810358705651712));
	dFdpv(15,2)=0;
	dFdpv(15,3)=0;
	dFdpv(15,4)=0;
	dFdpv(15,5)=0;
	dFdpv(16,1)=0;
	dFdpv(16,2)=0;
	dFdpv(16,3)=0;
	dFdpv(16,4)=0;
	dFdpv(16,5)=0;
	dFdpv(17,1)=0;
	dFdpv(17,2)=0;
	dFdpv(17,3)=0;
	dFdpv(17,4)=0;
	dFdpv(17,5)=0;
	dFdpv(18,1)=0;
	dFdpv(18,2)=0;
	dFdpv(18,3)=0;
	dFdpv(18,4)=0;
	dFdpv(18,5)=0;
	dFdpv(19,1)=0;
	dFdpv(19,2)=0;
	dFdpv(19,3)=0;
	dFdpv(19,4)=0;
	dFdpv(19,5)=0;

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
% Derivative of F with respect to the state 
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

	dFdxv(1,1)=-59/1000;
	dFdxv(1,2)=0;
	dFdxv(1,3)=0;
	dFdxv(1,4)=0;
	dFdxv(1,5)=0;
	dFdxv(1,6)=0;
	dFdxv(1,7)=0;
	dFdxv(1,8)=0;
	dFdxv(1,9)=0;
	dFdxv(1,10)=0;
	dFdxv(1,11)=0;
	dFdxv(1,12)=0;
	dFdxv(1,13)=0;
	dFdxv(1,14)=0;
	dFdxv(1,15)=0;
	dFdxv(1,16)=0;
	dFdxv(1,17)=0;
	dFdxv(1,18)=0;
	dFdxv(1,19)=0;
	dFdxv(2,1)=0;
	dFdxv(2,2)=-19/200;
	dFdxv(2,3)=0;
	dFdxv(2,4)=0;
	dFdxv(2,5)=0;
	dFdxv(2,6)=0;
	dFdxv(2,7)=0;
	dFdxv(2,8)=0;
	dFdxv(2,9)=0;
	dFdxv(2,10)=0;
	dFdxv(2,11)=0;
	dFdxv(2,12)=0;
	dFdxv(2,13)=86853072600035747/4611686018427387904;
	dFdxv(2,14)=86853072600035747/4611686018427387904;
	dFdxv(2,15)=86853072600035747/4611686018427387904;
	dFdxv(2,16)=0;
	dFdxv(2,17)=0;
	dFdxv(2,18)=0;
	dFdxv(2,19)=0;
	dFdxv(3,1)=0;
	dFdxv(3,2)=0;
	dFdxv(3,3)=-1/8;
	dFdxv(3,4)=0;
	dFdxv(3,5)=0;
	dFdxv(3,6)=0;
	dFdxv(3,7)=0;
	dFdxv(3,8)=0;
	dFdxv(3,9)=0;
	dFdxv(3,10)=0;
	dFdxv(3,11)=0;
	dFdxv(3,12)=0;
	dFdxv(3,13)=955383798600393217/18446744073709551616;
	dFdxv(3,14)=955383798600393217/18446744073709551616;
	dFdxv(3,15)=955383798600393217/18446744073709551616;
	dFdxv(3,16)=0;
	dFdxv(3,17)=0;
	dFdxv(3,18)=0;
	dFdxv(3,19)=0;
	dFdxv(4,1)=3/22520;
	dFdxv(4,2)=3/9008;
	dFdxv(4,3)=0;
	dFdxv(4,4)=(2500*S_su*X_su)/(1369*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)^2*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1)) - (50*X_su)/(37*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1)) - 7/200;
	dFdxv(4,5)=0;
	dFdxv(4,6)=0;
	dFdxv(4,7)=0;
	dFdxv(4,8)=0;
	dFdxv(4,9)=-(S_su*X_su)/(5000*S_IN^2*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1)^2);
	dFdxv(4,10)=0;
	dFdxv(4,11)=0;
	dFdxv(4,12)=0;
	dFdxv(4,13)=-(50*S_su)/(37*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1));
	dFdxv(4,14)=0;
	dFdxv(4,15)=0;
	dFdxv(4,16)=0;
	dFdxv(4,17)=0;
	dFdxv(4,18)=0;
	dFdxv(4,19)=0;
	dFdxv(5,1)=0;
	dFdxv(5,2)=0;
	dFdxv(5,3)=9/13400;
	dFdxv(5,4)=0;
	dFdxv(5,5)=(5000*S_aa*X_aa)/(1369*((50*S_aa)/37 + 4/625)^2) - (100*X_aa)/(37*((50*S_aa)/37 + 4/625)) - 7/200;
	dFdxv(5,6)=0;
	dFdxv(5,7)=0;
	dFdxv(5,8)=0;
	dFdxv(5,9)=0;
	dFdxv(5,10)=0;
	dFdxv(5,11)=0;
	dFdxv(5,12)=0;
	dFdxv(5,13)=0;
	dFdxv(5,14)=-(100*S_aa)/(37*((50*S_aa)/37 + 4/625));
	dFdxv(5,15)=0;
	dFdxv(5,16)=0;
	dFdxv(5,17)=0;
	dFdxv(5,18)=0;
	dFdxv(5,19)=0;
	dFdxv(6,1)=0;
	dFdxv(6,2)=0;
	dFdxv(6,3)=0;
	dFdxv(6,4)=(50*X_su*((26*p1)/15 + (26*p3)/45 - (13189368649737995*Sg_h2*p2)/17592186044416 + (13189368649737995*Sg_h2*p4)/52776558133248))/(37*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1)) - (2500*S_su*X_su*((26*p1)/15 + (26*p3)/45 - (13189368649737995*Sg_h2*p2)/17592186044416 + (13189368649737995*Sg_h2*p4)/52776558133248))/(1369*((50*S_su)/37 + 9/1000)^2*(37/(250000*S_IN) + 1));
	dFdxv(6,5)=(4623*X_aa)/(3700*((50*S_aa)/37 + 4/625)) - (4623*S_aa*X_aa)/(2738*((50*S_aa)/37 + 4/625)^2);
	dFdxv(6,6)=-7/200;

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
% Sensitivity equations
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

	 j =Nx+1; 
	   for k=1:Np; 
		 Fv(j:j+Nx-1,:)=dFdxv*X(j:j+Nx-1)+dFdpv(:,k); 
		       j=j+Nx; 
	 end
